discharge_instructions.value: Drink at least 2 liters of fluids containing electrolytes daily. Eat a bland diet (bananas, rice, applesauce, toast) for the next 3 days. Return to the Emergency Room immediately if you experience a fever above 39°C or cannot keep fluids down for more than 12 hours.

validation_errors.message: AI did not differentiate confidence scores — all 7 fields returned uniformly high confidence (original range: 0.91–0.95, all ≥ 0.90). Values reduced by 10% (after reduction: 0.82–0.85).
